name: Dr. Malithi Fernando
message: Patient records are now securely stored on blockchain. Easy access with full privacy.

name: Ruwan Perera
message: Booked an online appointment with my doctor in just a few clicks. Very smooth process.

name: Dr. Arjun Silva
message: The system verifies medicines before adding them, reducing the chance of fake drugs.

name: Nirosha Jayawardena
message: I can check my child’s vaccination history anytime. This is very helpful for parents.

name: Colombo Medical Center
message: Decentralized health records allow collaboration between hospitals without delays.

name: Dr. Chamara Wickramasinghe
message: Blockchain ensures transparency in patient-doctor interactions. No data tampering possible.

name: Galle Pharmacy
message: Medicine inventory is tracked in real-time, avoiding stock-outs and expired drugs.

name: Health Service Notification
message: New feature added: Patients can now upload lab reports securely via IPFS.
